author: FireAndRescueAcademy
description: Configurable announcement button panel. Each button posts predefined text to one or more configured channels.
install_msg: AnnouncementPanel loaded. Add buttons with `[p]annpanelset add <key> <label> | <message>`, attach channels, then post with `[p]annpanel post`.
short: Configurable buttons that post preset announcements to channels.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level button labels, messages, target channel IDs, and role settings.
